name: Brown Rice Pilaf with Vegetables and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh green beans, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heavy large skillet over low heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until golden and tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Add rice and garlic; sauté for 1 minute.
4. Add water and salt; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover tightly, and cook until the rice is tender and almost all liquid is absorbed, about 35 minutes. Do not stir.
6. Uncover skillet and distribute green beans, squash, broccoli, corn, and carrot evenly over the surface of the rice.
7. Cover and cook until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 10 minutes.
8. Remove from heat. Stir in red bell pepper and sesame seeds.
9. Mix in soy sauce. Toss to coat.
